role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on scripts, place names ('JLR', 'Tupac Amaru'), and language (Spanish).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, altitude, and settlement patterns on slopes.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified Eucalyptus and scrub vegetation types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road markings (yellow curbs), infrastructure (utility poles), and building codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles and cross-domain features.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Peru. The linguistic agent provided the decisive evidence ('Tupac Amaru', 'JLR'), which the tournament judge correctly prioritized in the final match against Bolivia. All agents stayed within their domains and provided grounded evidence.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately cited visible text on the blue sign and wall mural.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the steep, semi-arid Andean terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified the Eucalyptus trees and scrub.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly noted the yellow curbs and brick construction.
